calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Petitioners: Ying Yun Lu and Yui Kwan Chow, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the two Minors: Thomas Jefferson Chow and Sarah Marie Chow.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Thomas J. Zhang and Sarah Marie Zhang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Reset To Jun-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Ying Yun Lu, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Thomas Jefferson Chow and Sarah Marie Chow, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minors' Father consent, notice and proof of service, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minors is continued to June 23, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
For Petitioner to submit proof of service of the new hearing date.
